name: RPlog_Mandalore_-_Tunneling_Out
title: Mandalore: Tunneling Out
summary: Trapped underground after the site's collapse, Paul Nighman and his companions, Shenner, Dane Noth, Kairne, and Urio'kosh, weigh their dwindling options and decide to dig and climb their way out through a maze of tunnels. The exhausting effort tests them all as they heave at debris, force open passages, and squeeze through tight, slippery shafts, with the claustrophobic Shenner fighting down panic in the dark. A vote sends them down a side tunnel that Shenner discovers, and the battered group presses on past cave-ins, trading barbs and grudging cooperation between the offworlders and the prickly Mandalorians. Paul takes a head wound in the scramble and tries to hide it, until Shenner notices the blood and stops to bind it for him. Worn down but unbroken, the expedition tunnels onward toward open air, their hard-won trust forged in the crawl out of the ruins.
